variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The actual daily average temperature recorded at Pamandzi on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: climatological_temp_trend_feb
variables.description: The average daily temperature change between February 1st and February 8th based on historical climatology (1991-2020).

variables.name: itcz_position_anomaly
variables.description: The latitudinal displacement of the Intertropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ) relative to its mean position near Mayotte on 2026-02-08, affecting cloud cover and solar radiation.

variables.name: presence_of_tropical_depression
variables.description: Whether a tropical depression or cyclone is active within 500km of Mayotte on 2026-02-08, which typically lowers average temperatures through increased cloud cover and precipitation.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: chasiv_yar_capture
variables.description: Whether Russian forces have established full control over the town of Chasiv Yar, which is a major defensive height and obstacle between the front line and Kostyantynivka.

variables.name: distance_from_frontline
variables.description: The distance from the nearest Russian-controlled territory to the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: artillery_fire_control
variables.description: A measure of the intensity of Russian artillery fire or drone strikes directly impacting the Kostyantynivka railroad station area, indicating proximity and operational reach.

variables.name: negotiated_ceasefire_agreement
variables.description: The existence of a formal or informal ceasefire or settlement agreement signed before March 31, 2026, that includes the transfer of territorial control in the Donetsk region.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_battle_count
variables.description: The total number of ACLED 'Battles' recorded in Saudi Arabia during the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01, used to calculate the baseline average.

variables.name: yemen_saudi_truce_active
variables.description: Whether a formal or de facto ceasefire between the Houthi movement and the Saudi-led coalition remains active during the 30-day forecast window.

variables.name: houthi_incursion_frequency
variables.description: The number of ground-based military incursions or border skirmishes by Houthi forces into Saudi territory (Najran, Jizan, or Asir) during the 30-day window.

variables.name: internal_security_operations
variables.description: The number of armed clashes between Saudi state security forces and organized militants (e.g., AQAP, ISIS, or local dissidents) recorded as 'Battles' within the 30-day window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: published_peer_reviewed_study
variables.description: Whether a peer-reviewed clinical study on Lumina's efficacy has been published by the time of resolution.

variables.name: s_mutans_reduction_percentage
variables.description: The average percentage reduction of Streptococcus mutans in the oral microbiome of treated subjects compared to controls.

variables.name: bcs3_l1_colonization_stability
variables.description: The percentage of users who maintain stable colonization of the BCS3-L1 strain for at least 12 months after a single application.

variables.name: fda_clearance_status
variables.description: Whether the treatment has received FDA clearance or equivalent regulatory approval as a therapeutic for cavity prevention.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: australian_open_2026_winner_identity
variables.description: Whether the winner of the 2026 Australian Open is a player other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner. (Note: The tournament ends February 1st, 2026).

variables.name: non_duo_top_four_seeds
variables.description: Number of players in the ATP Top 4 rankings as of May 1st, 2026, excluding Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner.

variables.name: major_titles_outside_top_two
variables.description: Total number of Grand Slam titles won by active players other than Alcaraz, Sinner, and Djokovic (e.g., Medvedev, Zverev, etc.) prior to the 2026 French Open.

variables.name: novak_djokovic_retirement_status
variables.description: Whether Novak Djokovic has officially retired from professional tennis or announced his final season prior to the start of the 2026 US Open.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_changes
variables.description: The net change in the federal funds rate target (in basis points) between February 2026 and May 2026; lower rates reduce political friction.

variables.name: white_house_legal_memo_leak
variables.description: Public reporting of a formal Office of Legal Counsel (OLC) or White House Counsel memo asserting the President's authority to fire the Fed Chair for policy disagreement.

variables.name: cpi_inflation_rate
variables.description: The year-over-year Consumer Price Index (CPI) percentage increase as of the most recent report before May 2026; high inflation provides 'cause' arguments for mismanagement.

variables.name: trump_public_demand_dismissal
variables.description: A direct public statement or social media post by President Trump explicitly calling for Powell's immediate removal or stating he has 'fired' him before May 15, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: fda_ai_device_list_updates
variables.description: The number of total AI/ML-enabled medical devices listed in the FDA's official database as of the February 2026 update.

variables.name: pccp_final_guidance_published
variables.description: Whether the FDA has published final guidance regarding Predetermined Change Control Plans (PCCPs) for AI-enabled software by December 31, 2025.

variables.name: public_llm_presubmission_count
variables.description: The number of distinct medical technology companies that have publicly announced (via press release or SEC filing) filing a pre-submission or 510(k) for an LLM-based device by January 2026.

variables.name: fda_generative_ai_whitepaper
variables.description: Whether the FDA Digital Health Center of Excellence has released a formal whitepaper or specific regulatory framework dedicated specifically to Generative AI or Foundation Models by March 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: joint_military_exercises_count
variables.description: The number of joint military exercises involving at least three of the specified MENA countries (excluding the four excluded states) conducted between January 2025 and June 2026.

variables.name: red_sea_security_initiative
variables.description: Whether a formal multilateral agreement is signed specifically to address maritime security in the Red Sea or Bab al-Mandab involving Egypt, Jordan, and at least one other qualifying MENA state.

variables.name: gcc_plus_security_summit
variables.description: The number of high-level ministerial or heads-of-state summits held between the GCC and other MENA states (like Egypt, Jordan, or Iraq) specifically focused on regional defense integration.

variables.name: arab_league_defense_revitalization
variables.description: Whether the Arab League formally announces the activation or significant expansion of the Joint Arab Force or a similar collective security mechanism involving at least three eligible MENA states.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: avg_temp_feb_01_2026
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-01, representing the baseline for the comparison.

variables.name: historical_prob_increase
variables.description: The historical frequency (from 1990-2025) that the daily average temperature on February 8th was higher than on February 1st at this specific station.

variables.name: nao_index_early_feb
variables.description: The value of the North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index during the first week of February 2026, which significantly influences winter temperature trends in Western Europe.

variables.name: warming_trend_binary
variables.description: Whether the 7-day weather forecast issued on 2026-02-01 predicts a positive temperature trend (warming) for the Auvergne region leading up to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: baseline_elo_rating
variables.description: The Elo rating of R Praggnanandhaa as listed on the FIDE rankings Wikipedia page on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: active_tournament_participation
variables.description: Whether R Praggnanandhaa participated in a FIDE-rated tournament (e.g., Tata Steel Chess) in the 30 days preceding February 2026.

variables.name: required_rating_gain
variables.description: The absolute increase in Elo points required to meet the 1% threshold based on the February 1st baseline.

variables.name: wikipedia_update_latency
variables.description: The delay in days between the official FIDE rating list release (usually the 1st of the month) and the corresponding update on the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: wti_crude_price_change
variables.description: The absolute percentage change in the price of WTI crude oil between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant new military conflict or escalation in a major oil-producing region (e.g., Middle East) during the week of Feb 1-8.

variables.name: ovx_starting_level
variables.description: The value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index on 2026-02-01; lower starting values often correlate with a higher probability of an increase.

variables.name: vix_index_change
variables.description: The change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) between Feb 1 and Feb 8, representing broader market risk sentiment.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: crl_q4_2025_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The percentage difference between Charles River Laboratories' reported adjusted earnings per share (EPS) for Q4 2025 and the consensus analyst estimate. Earnings are typically reported in early February.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 Index (SPY) between the market close on 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, reflecting broader market sentiment.

variables.name: healthcare_sector_relative_strength
variables.description: The performance of the Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLV) relative to the S&P 500 during the first week of February 2026.

variables.name: crl_fy2026_guidance_revision
variables.description: Whether Charles River Laboratories issues or maintains a positive full-year 2026 revenue growth guidance (above 0%) during their February 2026 earnings call.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, as a primary driver of Exxon Mobil's revenue expectations.

variables.name: xom_earnings_surprise
variables.description: If Exxon Mobil reports earnings during the week (typically early February), the percentage difference between actual EPS and analyst consensus estimates.

variables.name: sp500_index_weekly_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index from 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-08, reflecting broader market sentiment and systematic risk.

variables.name: fed_interest_rate_hike
variables.description: Whether the Federal Reserve announces an interest rate increase in the week leading up to or during 2026-02-08, which generally impacts capital-intensive energy companies.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price_usd
variables.description: The stock price of Tesla Inc. (TSLA) in late 2028, representing the largest portion of Musk's public equity holding.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_billions
variables.description: The private market valuation of SpaceX by late 2028, reflecting its growth in Starlink and launch services.

variables.name: xai_valuation_billions
variables.description: The valuation of Musk's AI company, xAI, which serves as a major potential driver for net worth growth outside of legacy companies.

variables.name: musk_retains_tesla_equity
variables.description: Whether Musk maintains his current or expanded ownership stake in Tesla, specifically related to the legal resolution of his compensation package.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: sag_award_best_actor
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role.

variables.name: bafta_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role.

variables.name: betting_market_odds_rank
variables.description: Wagner Moura's rank in betting market odds (e.g., GoldDerby or Oddschecker) for Best Actor at the time of the Oscars ceremony.

variables.name: precursor_win_count
variables.description: Total number of major televised precursor wins for Wagner Moura (Golden Globe, SAG, BAFTA, Critics' Choice) for 'The Secret Agent'.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_resolutions
variables.description: The number of draft resolutions concerning the conflict in Sudan that are formally circulated or put to a vote in the UN Security Council between February 15, 2026, and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: russia_veto_usage_sudan
variables.description: Whether Russia exercises its veto power on any resolution specifically concerning the Sudan conflict between February 15, 2026, and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: unitams_successor_mandate_discussion
variables.description: Whether the UN Security Council holds a formal meeting specifically to discuss a new political or monitoring mission to replace or succeed UNITAMS or the current Panel of Experts before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: ipc_phase_5_famine_declarations
variables.description: The number of additional regions in Sudan (beyond Zamzam camp) officially declared to be in IPC Phase 5 (Famine) by the Integrated Food Security Phase Classification or UN agencies by April 15, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: federal_indictment_issued
variables.description: Formal issuance of a federal indictment against Barack Obama by the Department of Justice before July 2026.

variables.name: doj_investigation_announcements
variables.description: The number of public statements or official press releases from the Department of Justice explicitly naming Barack Obama as a subject of a criminal investigation between February 2026 and July 2026.

variables.name: special_counsel_appointment
variables.description: Whether a Special Counsel is appointed specifically to investigate the 'treasonous conspiracy' allegations involving the 2016 and 2020 elections before June 2026.

variables.name: trump_approval_rating
variables.description: The average weekly percentage of 'Excellent' or 'Good' ratings for President Trump's job performance in the FiveThirtyEight or similar polling average during the first half of 2026, which may influence the political capital used for high-profile prosecutions.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: bamako_fuel_index
variables.description: Average daily availability of fuel in Bamako as a percentage of requirements, reflecting the effectiveness of JNIM's blockade.

variables.name: russian_personnel_count
variables.description: The estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel active in the Bamako region to support the Malian government.

variables.name: malian_government_relocation
variables.description: Whether the Malian government officially relocates its primary administrative functions from Bamako to another city (e.g., Segou or Mopti) due to security concerns.

variables.name: jnim_urban_capture_history
variables.description: The number of regional capitals or major urban centers (population >100,000) captured and held by JNIM for at least 72 hours between 2025-01-01 and 2026-05-15.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_confirmed
variables.description: Whether Israel is officially confirmed as a participant in the 2026 Eurovision Song Contest by the European Broadcasting Union (EBU).

variables.name: israel_betting_odds_rank
variables.description: Israel's position in the aggregate betting odds to win Eurovision 2026 as of May 1, 2026 (1 representing the favorite).

variables.name: israel_televote_score_share
variables.description: The percentage of the total possible televote points (public vote) awarded to Israel during the Grand Final.

variables.name: regional_conflict_intensity_index
variables.description: A qualitative assessment of the intensity of the regional conflict involving Israel in early 2026, where higher values indicate lower intensity/higher stability favoring cultural participation.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_30_day_avg
variables.description: The average number of 'Protests' in Azerbaijan per 30-day window over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15.

variables.name: significant_political_unrest_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a major political catalyst (e.g., disputed election, high-profile arrest, or economic shock) in Azerbaijan during the target window.

variables.name: government_repression_index
variables.description: A qualitative measure of the intensity of state crackdown on public assembly in Azerbaijan leading up to the target date, where higher values reflect more severe restrictions.

variables.name: protest_count_target_period
variables.description: The total number of 'Protests' recorded by ACLED in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_highest_arena_score
variables.description: The highest Arena Score achieved by any Alibaba Qwen model on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard as of February 28, 2026.

variables.name: competitor_top_arena_score
variables.description: The highest Arena Score achieved by any model from a competitor (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard as of February 28, 2026.

variables.name: qwen_2_5_plus_release
variables.description: Whether Alibaba has released a major successor to the Qwen 2.5 series (e.g., Qwen 3 or a significantly upgraded Qwen 2.5 Max) before February 28, 2026.

variables.name: us_export_control_impact
variables.description: Whether new or expanded US export controls on advanced AI chips (e.g., NVIDIA H20/B20 or successors) have significantly restricted Alibaba Cloud's compute capacity for training frontier models between mid-2024 and February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the effective federal funds rate between February 15 and February 22, 2026, which sets the baseline for short-term market yields.

variables.name: fomc_meeting_occurrence
variables.description: Whether a scheduled Federal Open Market Committee meeting concludes between February 15 and February 22, 2026, potentially altering interest rate expectations.

variables.name: cpi_surprise_magnitude
variables.description: The difference between actual and expected Consumer Price Index (CPI) year-over-year growth for the most recent release prior to February 22, influencing inflation expectations.

variables.name: treasury_3mo_auction_yield
variables.description: The high rate yield of the most recent 13-week (3-month) Treasury bill auction held between February 15 and February 22, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: chikunova_200m_time
variables.description: Evgeniia Chikunova's current world record time for the 200m breaststroke long course as of the forecast date.

variables.name: major_championships_before_resolution
variables.description: The number of major international long course swimming championships (e.g., World Aquatics Championships, Olympic Games) occurring between 2025-01-01 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: competitor_best_time_gap
variables.description: The difference between the second fastest active swimmer's personal best and Chikunova's world record in the 200m breaststroke (LC).

variables.name: world_aquatics_suspension_status
variables.description: Whether Russian athletes (like Chikunova) remain restricted from World Aquatics events or major international recognition, potentially limiting the ratification of new records from Russian domestic meets.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the European Central Bank's Deposit Facility Rate (DFR) announced and effective between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target2_excess_liquidity_delta
variables.description: The change in the total volume of excess liquidity in the Eurosystem (holdings in the deposit facility plus current account holdings minus reserve requirements) between the two dates.

variables.name: estr_volatility_index
variables.description: The standard deviation of the daily volume-weighted trimmed mean of the euro short-term rate over the 7-day period leading up to 2026-02-22, indicating rate stability.

variables.name: ecb_meeting_occurrence
variables.description: Whether a Governing Council monetary policy meeting was scheduled to take place between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22, which could influence market expectations and liquidity provision.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: brest_avg_temp_feb_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Brest Bretagne Airport weather station on 2026-02-15.

variables.name: brest_avg_temp_feb_22
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Brest Bretagne Airport weather station on 2026-02-22.

variables.name: historical_warming_trend_prob
variables.description: The historical frequency (from 1990-2025) of the daily average temperature being higher on Feb 22nd than on Feb 15th at this station.

variables.name: nao_index_feb_late
variables.description: The value of the North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index during the second half of February 2026, which significantly influences winter temperatures in Western France.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: brent_prior_week_momentum
variables.description: The percentage change in the Brent crude oil price (DCOILBRENTEU) during the seven days immediately preceding February 1, 2026. This captures existing price trends.

variables.name: usd_index_weekly_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) between February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026. Oil is priced in USD and typically has an inverse correlation with dollar strength.

variables.name: eia_inventory_delta_mb
variables.description: The net change in U.S. commercial crude oil inventories (excluding the Strategic Petroleum Reserve) in millions of barrels, as reported by the EIA during the week of February 1-8, 2026.

variables.name: major_supply_disruption
variables.description: A binary indicator of whether a significant geopolitical event, strike, or infrastructure failure causes a supply disruption of at least 500,000 barrels per day during the forecast period.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: clinical_trial_phase
variables.description: The highest clinical trial phase reached for any Heartland virus vaccine candidate by January 2026 (0 = none/preclinical, 1 = Phase I, 2 = Phase II, 3 = Phase III, 4 = FDA/EMA Approved).

variables.name: active_vaccine_candidates
variables.description: The number of distinct vaccine candidates for Heartland virus disease currently listed in international clinical trial registries.

variables.name: human_to_human_transmission
variables.description: Whether Wikipedia reports confirmed cases of sustained human-to-human transmission of Heartland virus, which would significantly increase urgency for vaccine development.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_mention
variables.description: Whether the Heartland virus Wikipedia page or the 'List of infectious diseases' specifically mentions a vaccine as a 'Prevention' or 'Vaccination' method.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: macau_gross_gaming_revenue_growth
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Macau's total gross gaming revenue (GGR) for the most recently reported month prior to February 2026.

variables.name: lvs_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) of LVS stock as of the market close on 2026-02-15, indicating overbought or oversold conditions.

variables.name: vix_index_volatility
variables.description: The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) level on 2026-02-15, representing market expectations of near-term volatility which impacts risky assets like casino stocks.

variables.name: us_china_travel_restrictions
variables.description: Whether there are any new or expanded major travel restrictions or health-related quarantine mandates issued by China or the US affecting Macau/Singapore travel between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Scottish Labour Party be the second largest party in Holyrood after the next election?

variables.name: labour_polling_seat_share
variables.description: The projected number of seats for Scottish Labour in Holyrood based on polling averages three months prior to the election.

variables.name: conservative_seat_retention
variables.description: The number of seats won by the Scottish Conservative Party in the next Holyrood election.

variables.name: snp_seat_dominance
variables.description: Whether the SNP wins more seats than the Scottish Labour Party, a necessary condition for Labour to be second rather than first.

variables.name: labour_conservative_seat_differential
variables.description: The difference in the number of seats won by Scottish Labour minus seats won by the Scottish Conservatives.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: If Viktor Orbán leads a party in the 2026 Hungarian Election, will he become Prime Minister?

variables.name: fidesz_tisza_polling_gap
variables.description: The average percentage point lead of the Tisza Party over the Fidesz-KDNP alliance in independent opinion polls conducted in March 2026. A negative value indicates a Fidesz lead.

variables.name: fidesz_parliamentary_seats
variables.description: The total number of seats won by the Fidesz-KDNP alliance in the 2026 Hungarian National Assembly. A majority requires 100 seats.

variables.name: opposition_coalition_formation
variables.description: Whether the Tisza Party and other opposition parties (such as DK or Momentum) formally agree to support a shared candidate for Prime Minister if they collectively hold a majority.

variables.name: hungary_gdp_growth_q1_2026
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Hungary's real GDP for the first quarter of 2026, reflecting the economic environment leading into the election.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Roland Garros Airport will be higher on 2026-03-08 than on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: historical_march_warming_trend
variables.description: Historical probability (0-1) that the daily average temperature on March 8th is higher than on March 1st at Roland Garros Airport based on the last 20 years of data.

variables.name: march_1_temp_anomaly
variables.description: The daily average temperature on 2026-03-01 expressed as a deviation from the historical average for that specific date.

variables.name: cyclone_activity_vicinity
variables.description: Presence of a named tropical cyclone or depression within 500km of Reunion Island between March 1 and March 8, 2026, which significantly impacts local temperature variability.

variables.name: enso_index_value
variables.description: The Oceanic Niño Index (ONI) value for the Feb-Mar-Apr period, influencing regional temperature patterns in the Indian Ocean.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Sacramento Kings have the worst record in the NBA?

variables.name: kings_current_win_percentage
variables.description: The Sacramento Kings' winning percentage as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: worst_record_win_threshold
variables.description: The winning percentage of the team currently holding the worst record in the NBA as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: fox_sabonis_games_missed
variables.description: Combined number of games missed due to injury by De'Aaron Fox and Domantas Sabonis during the 2025-26 season up to March 1.

variables.name: kings_mathematical_elimination_worst
variables.description: Whether it is mathematically impossible for the Kings to finish with the worst record based on current standings and remaining schedule.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: jnim_control_of_kati
variables.description: Whether JNIM or its affiliates take and hold the Kati military base (the main military camp near Bamako) for at least 24 hours.

variables.name: africa_corps_withdrawal
variables.description: Whether there is a significant reduction (over 50%) or complete withdrawal of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel from the Bamako region.

variables.name: bamako_fuel_availability
variables.description: The average daily fuel availability in Bamako as a percentage of normal 2024 levels, reflecting the effectiveness of the blockade.

variables.name: internal_coup_attempt
variables.description: The number of reported coup attempts or significant internal military mutinies against General Assimi Goita's government before June 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the weekly value of central bank liquidity swaps held by the Federal Reserve have increased by 2026-03-08 as compared to its value on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: fx_swap_basis_spread
variables.description: The average 3-month cross-currency basis swap spread for major currencies (EUR, JPY, GBP) against the USD; more negative values indicate higher dollar funding stress.

variables.name: global_financial_stress_index
variables.description: A measure of systemic financial stress (e.g., St. Louis Fed Financial Stress Index); values above 0 indicate above-average market stress.

variables.name: major_central_bank_liquidity_demand
variables.description: Whether a major central bank (ECB, BoJ, SNB, BoE, BoC) has announced an increase in the frequency or size of their USD repo operations in the week leading up to 2026-03-08.

variables.name: current_swap_balance_level
variables.description: The outstanding value of central bank liquidity swaps on 2026-03-01; lower baseline levels make any new drawdowns more likely to result in a percentage increase.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many fatalities in Niue for the 30 days before 2026-03-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of fatalities over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,fatalities
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of fatalities over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more fatalities would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_fatalities_count
variables.description: The total number of fatalities recorded in Niue by ACLED in the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01.

variables.name: target_period_fatalities
variables.description: The number of fatalities occurring in Niue during the 30-day period from 2026-02-06 to 2026-03-08.

variables.name: civil_unrest_incidents
variables.description: The number of reported protests or riots in Niue in the three months prior to the target period.

variables.name: political_instability_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a major political crisis or state-level leadership challenge in Niue between 2025-09-01 and 2026-03-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Silver (SI) hit (LOW) $60 by end of June?

variables.name: silver_price_mar_2026
variables.description: The official CME settlement price for the Silver (SI) Active Month on March 2, 2026.

variables.name: gold_silver_ratio
variables.description: The ratio of the price of gold per ounce to the price of silver per ounce as of June 1, 2026.

variables.name: silver_all_time_high_breach
variables.description: Whether the Silver (SI) Active Month settlement price has exceeded its historical all-time high (approximately $50) at any point between March 1, 2026, and June 1, 2026.

variables.name: us_dollar_index_dxy
variables.description: The value of the US Dollar Index (DXY) on June 1, 2026, which inversely correlates with dollar-denominated commodity prices.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more 'Battles' in Taiwan for the 30 days before 2026-03-08 compared to the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: (1+2)/12=0.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 1 or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_battle_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded by ACLED in Taiwan during the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01. This determines the threshold for the comparison.

variables.name: formal_declaration_of_conflict
variables.description: Has a formal state of war or large-scale military conflict been declared or initiated between Taiwan and a foreign power by February 2026?

variables.name: china_taiwan_maritime_skirmishes
variables.description: The number of kinetic maritime or aerial engagements involving exchange of fire between PRC and ROC forces in the Taiwan Strait in the 60 days prior to 2026-03-08.

variables.name: cross_strait_diplomatic_crisis_level
variables.description: A measure of diplomatic tension where 1 is status quo and 10 is the immediate eve of invasion or total blockade, based on the presence of sanctions and severed communications.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will any branch of the U.S. military have hypersonic weapons operationally deployed with field units, aboard naval vessels, or on aircraft by 30 April 2026?

variables.name: army_lrhw_missile_inventory
variables.description: The number of operational live missiles delivered to the 5th Battalion, 3rd Field Artillery Regiment by April 30, 2026. A full battery requires 8 missiles for complete operational tasking.

variables.name: official_lrhw_ioc_declaration
variables.description: Whether senior U.S. Army leadership has officially declared Initial Operational Capability (IOC) for the Long-Range Hypersonic Weapon (LRHW) system by April 30, 2026.

variables.name: successful_dark_eagle_flight_tests
variables.description: The count of additional successful end-to-end flight tests of the Dark Eagle/LRHW system conducted between March 2025 and April 2026. Repeated success is a prerequisite for leadership 'blessing' of operational status.

variables.name: hacm_operational_readiness_status
variables.description: Whether the Air Force Hypersonic Attack Cruise Missile (HACM) or any other air-launched hypersonic program achieves a 'Ready for Operational Tasking' status before the deadline (unlikely but possible if accelerated).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the effective yield of securities with an investment grade rating of B in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by 2026-03-08 as compared to its value on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: change_in_10y_treasury_yield
variables.description: The difference in the 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity Yield between March 1 and March 8, 2026, which often serves as the benchmark for corporate borrowing costs.

variables.name: change_in_ice_bofa_b_spread
variables.description: The change in the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of the ICE BofA US Corporate B Index over the one-week period, reflecting changes in perceived credit risk.

variables.name: vix_index_weekly_trend
variables.description: The net change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) between March 1 and March 8, 2026, indicating shifts in market sentiment and risk appetite.

variables.name: fomc_meeting_or_major_data_release
variables.description: Whether a major Federal Reserve announcement or a significant economic data release (e.g., Non-Farm Payrolls or CPI) occurs during the week of March 1 to March 8, 2026, causing yield volatility.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08, reflecting broad market sentiment.

variables.name: financial_sector_relative_performance
variables.description: The performance of the Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLF) relative to the S&P 500 during the first week of March 2026.

variables.name: vix_index_level
variables.description: The level of the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) on 2026-03-08, indicating market stress which often negatively impacts asset managers.

variables.name: fed_interest_rate_change_expectation
variables.description: Whether market expectations for the Federal Reserve's next interest rate move shifted toward a hike or a 'higher for longer' stance during this week.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Germany become more authoritarian in 2025?

variables.name: afd_polling_average
variables.description: The average polling percentage for the Alternative for Germany (AfD) party in national polls during 2025, reflecting political polarization and shifts toward populist sentiment.

variables.name: civil_liberties_score_change
variables.description: The specific change in the 'Civil Liberties' sub-score of the Economist Democracy Index for Germany in the 2025 report compared to 2024.

variables.name: federal_election_instability
variables.description: Whether the 2025 German federal election results in a significant delay (over 3 months) in forming a government or leads to a minority government, which can impact the 'Functioning of Government' score.

variables.name: political_participation_score
variables.description: The score for the 'Political Participation' category in the 2025 Economist Democracy Index report for Germany.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Pneumonia by 2026-03-08?

variables.name: current_vaccine_listing_status
variables.description: Whether the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page currently lists a vaccine for Pneumonia as of March 2024.

variables.name: pneumonia_vaccine_availability_consensus
variables.description: Whether existing vaccines (e.g., PCV13, PPSV23) are medically recognized as 'the' vaccine for pneumonia, despite pneumonia being a syndrome caused by multiple pathogens.

variables.name: wiki_edit_frequency_infectious_diseases
variables.description: The average number of edits per month to the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page leading up to the resolution date.

variables.name: new_pathogen_vaccine_approvals
variables.description: The number of new vaccines for pathogens commonly causing pneumonia (e.g., RSV, new Strep strains) approved by major regulators (FDA/EMA) between 2024 and 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will HPE's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: hpe_q1_earnings_beat
variables.description: Whether HPE reports Q1 2026 earnings per share (EPS) that exceed consensus analyst expectations during the week of March 1st, 2026.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 Index between the market close on 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08.

variables.name: hpe_iv_30d
variables.description: The 30-day implied volatility of HPE options as of the market close on 2026-03-01, reflecting expected market turbulence.

variables.name: fed_interest_rate_change
variables.description: Whether the Federal Reserve announces an interest rate hike or a signal of hawkish policy shift in the week leading up to March 8th, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: arab_league_defense_cooperation_index
variables.description: The number of high-level ministerial meetings (Defense or Interior) between at least three eligible MENA states specifically discussing regional security frameworks between March 2025 and June 2026.

variables.name: red_sea_security_initiative_status
variables.description: Whether a formal proposal for a joint maritime security force or intelligence-sharing pact involving Egypt, Jordan, and at least one Gulf state (e.g., UAE, Bahrain, Oman) is officially tabled by a regional organization.

variables.name: gcc_plus_security_expansion
variables.description: The number of non-GCC eligible MENA states (e.g., Egypt, Jordan, Morocco) invited to participate in a formal, multi-year joint defense or counter-terrorism integration program by June 2026.

variables.name: maghreb_security_rapprochement
variables.description: A binary indicator of whether Algeria, Tunisia, and Libya sign a trilateral security pact or memorandum of understanding regarding border security and counter-terrorism.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market capitalization for USDT & USDC stablecoins surpass $300 billion USD by June 30, 2026?

variables.name: combined_mcap_jan_2026
variables.description: The combined market capitalization of USDT and USDC as of January 1, 2026, serving as a baseline for the final six-month push.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_june_2026
variables.description: The upper bound of the Federal Funds Rate as of June 2026; lower rates typically increase liquidity and risk-on sentiment in crypto markets.

variables.name: us_stablecoin_legislation_passed
variables.description: Whether a comprehensive federal stablecoin regulatory framework has been signed into law in the US by June 30, 2026, which would likely boost USDC institutional adoption.

variables.name: bitcoin_price_june_2026
variables.description: The price of Bitcoin in June 2026, divided by 10,000 to scale; high crypto market activity generally correlates with higher stablecoin demand.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the average Arctic sea ice extent for March 2026 be the lowest on record for that month according to the National Snow and Ice Data Center (NSIDC)?

variables.name: february_2026_extent
variables.description: The average Arctic sea ice extent for the month immediately preceding the target month (February 2026), which serves as the starting point for the March maximum.

variables.name: arctic_oscillation_index_q1
variables.description: The average value of the Arctic Oscillation (AO) index for the first quarter (Jan-Mar) of 2026; a positive AO generally leads to more ice export and lower extents.

variables.name: arctic_surface_temp_anomaly
variables.description: The average surface air temperature anomaly in the Arctic (north of 60°N) during March 2026 relative to the 1981-2010 baseline.

variables.name: mid_march_extent_threshold
variables.description: Whether the daily Arctic sea ice extent on March 15, 2026, is lower than the daily extent on March 15, 2025 (approx. 14.2 million sq km).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Dominican Republic win the 2026 World Baseball Classic?

variables.name: dr_roster_all_stars
variables.description: Number of players on the Dominican Republic's active World Baseball Classic roster who were selected for the 2025 MLB All-Star Game.

variables.name: dr_pool_play_advancement
variables.description: Whether the Dominican Republic successfully advances out of the initial pool play group stage into the quarter-finals.

variables.name: japan_usa_elimination_status
variables.description: The number of the top two historical seeds (Japan and USA) that have been eliminated from the tournament prior to the final game.

variables.name: dr_bullpen_era_tournament
variables.description: The collective Earned Run Average (ERA) of the Dominican Republic's relief pitching staff throughout the 2026 tournament.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Troyes-Barberey Airport will be higher on 2026-03-22 than on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: avg_temp_mar_15
variables.description: The actual daily average temperature recorded at Troyes-Barberey on 2026-03-15, which serves as the baseline for the comparison.

variables.name: historical_trend_week_diff
variables.description: The mean historical difference in daily average temperature between March 22nd and March 15th at the same location over the last 30 years.

variables.name: seasonal_warming_anomaly
variables.description: The deviation of the regional 7-day temperature forecast for the week of March 15-22 from the long-term climatological mean for Troyes.

variables.name: passing_cold_front_indicator
variables.description: Whether a significant cold front or low-pressure system is projected to pass over the Grand Est region of France on 2026-03-22, potentially suppressing temperatures.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Bank of England decreases interest rates by 25 bps after March 2026 meeting?

variables.name: uk_cpi_inflation_feb_2026
variables.description: The year-on-year Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate in the UK for February 2026, which is the final major inflation print before the March meeting.

variables.name: bank_rate_prior_to_meeting
variables.description: The Bank of England's official Bank Rate immediately preceding the March 2026 meeting. Higher rates generally provide more room for cuts.

variables.name: uk_gdp_growth_q4_2025
variables.description: The quarterly GDP growth rate for the UK in the final quarter of 2025; low or negative growth increases the likelihood of a rate cut to stimulate the economy.

variables.name: market_implied_probability_of_cut
variables.description: The probability of a 25 bps cut as implied by Sonia (Sterling Overnight Index Average) futures or OIS markets one week before the March 2026 meeting.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Explosions/Remote violence' in Sao Tome and Principe for the 30 days before 2026-03-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Explosions/Remote violence'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Explosions/Remote violence' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_explosions_baseline
variables.description: The total number of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Sao Tome and Principe recorded by ACLED during the 360 days preceding 2026-03-15.

variables.name: recent_political_instability_index
variables.description: The number of 'Strategic developments' or 'Protests' involving violence in Sao Tome and Principe in the 90 days prior to 2026-02-20, indicating a breakdown in security.

variables.name: attempted_coup_or_mutiny
variables.description: Occurrence of a reported attempted coup, military mutiny, or large-scale armed assault on government infrastructure in Sao Tome and Principe between 2026-02-20 and 2026-03-22.

variables.name: regional_spillover_incidents
variables.description: Number of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in neighboring Gulf of Guinea maritime zones or nearby coastal states in the 30 days prior to the target window, which might indicate increased availability of explosives or regional militant activity.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the 4-week moving average of initial unemployment claims have increased by 2026-03-22 as compared to its value on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: latest_weekly_ic_count
variables.description: The seasonally adjusted initial claims for the week ending nearest to March 21, 2026.

variables.name: dropped_week_ic_value
variables.description: The seasonally adjusted initial claims value for the week that will be removed from the 4-week moving average calculation (the week ending 4 weeks prior to March 21, 2026).

variables.name: layoff_announcements_index
variables.description: A normalized index of major corporate layoff announcements in the first two weeks of March 2026 compared to the historical average for March.

variables.name: is_recessionary_period
variables.description: Whether the US economy is widely considered to be in a technical recession or significant downturn as of March 2026, typically leading to a sustained upward trend in moving averages.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the 30-day average of the Federal Reserve's Secured Overnight Financing Rate have increased by 2026-03-22 as compared to its value on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: fomc_rate_change_march_2026
variables.description: Whether the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) increases the target range for the federal funds rate at its March 2026 meeting.

variables.name: daily_sofr_volatility_basis_points
variables.description: The standard deviation of daily SOFR rates in the 30 days leading up to March 22, 2026, measured in basis points.

variables.name: fed_funds_effective_rate
variables.description: The effective federal funds rate (EFFR) on March 15, 2026, which highly correlates with the overnight SOFR.

variables.name: quarter_end_liquidity_pressure
variables.description: The presence of significant upward pressure on repo rates due to the proximity of the Q1 2026 quarter-end (March 31).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Isosporiasis by 2026-03-22?

variables.name: isosporiasis_clinical_trial_count
variables.description: The number of active or completed phase III clinical trials for an Isosporiasis vaccine globally as of late 2025.

variables.name: fda_ema_vaccine_approval
variables.description: Whether any major regulatory body (FDA or EMA) has approved a vaccine for human Isosporiasis by March 2026.

variables.name: wikipedia_list_vaccine_entry
variables.description: Presence of a 'Vaccine' entry or mention in the 'Vaccination' column for Isosporiasis on the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page.

variables.name: isosporiasis_research_funding_level
variables.description: Estimated annual global R&D funding specifically for Isosporiasis prevention (vaccine-related) in millions of USD.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Ajaccio will be higher on 2026-03-22 than on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: ajaccio_temp_march_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Ajaccio station on 2026-03-15.

variables.name: historical_climatological_trend
variables.description: The historical average temperature increase (or decrease) between March 15 and March 22 in Ajaccio based on the last 30 years of data.

variables.name: presence_of_cyclonic_system
variables.description: Whether a significant low-pressure system or cold front is forecast to pass over Corsica on 2026-03-22.

variables.name: ajaccio_cloud_cover_diff
variables.description: The difference in mean cloud cover (oktas) between March 22 and March 15; higher cloud cover often correlates with lower daytime highs in spring.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will VTRS's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: S_P_500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-03-13 and 2026-03-20, reflecting broad market sentiment.

variables.name: VTRS_beta_coefficient
variables.description: The 5-year monthly beta of Viatris Inc. relative to the market, indicating its relative volatility and correlation with market movements.

variables.name: healthcare_sector_index_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in a major healthcare sector ETF (like XLV) between 2026-03-13 and 2026-03-20, capturing industry-specific trends.

variables.name: VTRS_earnings_surprise_history
variables.description: The percentage difference between reported EPS and analyst estimates in the most recent quarterly report prior to March 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will DOC's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sector_performance_xlre
variables.description: The percentage change in the Real Estate Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLRE) between 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22, representing broader REIT market sentiment.

variables.name: ten_year_treasury_yield_change
variables.description: The absolute change in the 10-Year Treasury Note yield during the week of 2026-03-15 to 2026-03-22, as REITs are highly sensitive to interest rate fluctuations.

variables.name: doc_weekly_volatility
variables.description: The annualized historical volatility of DOC stock in the 30 days preceding 2026-03-15, indicating the likelihood of significant price swings.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_hike
variables.description: Whether the Federal Reserve announces an interest rate hike in a meeting occurring between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: BTC  close above 80K by end of March?

variables.name: btc_price_march_29
variables.description: The current price of Bitcoin as of the forensic date March 29, 2026.

variables.name: daily_price_volatility
variables.description: The average daily percentage change in Bitcoin price over the last 7 days of March.

variables.name: resistance_breakout_73k
variables.description: Whether Bitcoin has successfully broken and sustained a price above the $73,300 resistance level by March 29.

variables.name: net_etf_inflows_march
variables.description: The net institutional inflow into Bitcoin ETFs during the final week of March 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will China, Russia, the U.S., or the EU publicly announce new economic or trade sanctions that specifically target a state-owned oil or gas entity in Egypt, Jordan, or the United Arab Emirates (UAE) by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: uae_russia_evasion_evidence
variables.description: The number of official US or EU reports or public warnings explicitly naming UAE state-owned oil/gas entities as conduits for Russian sanctions evasion or money laundering between March 2024 and June 2026.

variables.name: brics_integration_tension
variables.description: Binary indicator of whether Egypt or the UAE officially adopts a non-USD currency for a major state-to-state oil/gas trade settlement with China or Russia, triggering a US policy review of their financial status.

variables.name: regional_conflict_escalation
variables.description: The peak number of direct military engagements or targeted strikes involving state-affiliated entities in the Red Sea or Suez Canal corridor that disrupt global energy shipping and are attributed to regional actors supported by target states.

variables.name: ofac_secondary_sanctions_expansion
variables.description: Binary indicator of whether the U.S. Treasury Department issues a new Executive Order specifically expanding its authority to target non-Russian financial institutions/entities involved in trade with Russia's energy sector.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Solana reach $100 in March?

variables.name: sol_price_start_march
variables.description: The price of Solana (SOL/USDT) on Binance at the beginning of March 2026 (00:00 AM ET on March 1st).

variables.name: sol_reached_100_before_march_29
variables.description: Whether Solana has already hit the $100 mark on a Binance 1-minute candle between March 1st and March 28th, 2026.

variables.name: btc_price_march_29
variables.description: The price of Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) on March 29, 2026, which often serves as a leading indicator for the broader crypto market sentiment.

variables.name: sol_30d_volatility
variables.description: The annualized 30-day historical volatility of Solana leading up to late March, indicating the likelihood of a price spike.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Anthropic be a designated supply chain risk on May 1, 2026?

variables.name: preliminary_injunction_granted
variables.description: Whether a U.S. court has granted a preliminary injunction or temporary restraining order staying the enforcement of the Secretary of War's designation before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: formal_fascsa_order_count
variables.description: The total number of formal orders issued under the Federal Acquisition Supply Chain Security Act (FASCSA) published in the Federal Register targeting Anthropic by April 30, 2026.

variables.name: anthropic_contract_negotiation_status
variables.description: Whether Anthropic and the Department of War reach a new compromise agreement or settlement that results in the withdrawal of the February 27 directive before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: judicial_review_petition_filed
variables.description: Whether Anthropic has filed a formal petition for judicial review under 41 U.S.C § 1327 or a similar challenge in federal court by April 15, 2026.
